zh-CN.name: 字母E
zh-CN.intro: 字母E是英文字母表里的第五个字母，形状像三根小棒搭在一起。很多好玩的东西都是以E开头的，比如大象、鸡蛋！

story.title: 🐘大象埃迪
story.body: 埃迪是一头可爱的小象，它最喜欢在河边玩水。有一天，天气很热，埃迪用长长的鼻子吸了一大口水，然后开心地朝天空喷去。神奇的事情发生了——喷出的水花在空中停留了一下，竟然形成了一个大大的字母E！水珠在阳光下闪闪发光，就像三根小彩虹搭成的一座桥。小猴子看到后惊呼：“哇，E！是大象埃迪的E！”小鸟们也飞过来，叽叽喳喳地学着说：“E，E！”埃迪看到大家这么开心，又用鼻子喷出一个小写的e，小动物们全都快乐地跳了起来。从那以后，森林里的小伙伴们都记住了这个有趣的字母。你也来试试吧！伸出你的食指，跟着我画：先画一条竖线，然后在上边画一条短横，中间画一条短横，下边画一条长一点的横。看，一个大大的E就写好了！

knowledge.title: 字母E为什么像小架子？
knowledge.body: 字母E的形状就像一个有上下两个横杠的小架子，好像可以放上可爱的小玩具。最早的字母E来自古代的图画，画的是一个人高兴地举起双手在欢呼。所以，字母E也代表着快乐和活力！

en.name: Letter E
en.intro: Letter E is the fifth letter in the alphabet. It looks like three little sticks put together. Many fun things start with E, like elephant, egg, and eagle!

story.title: 🐘Eddie the Elephant
story.body: Eddie was a cute little elephant who loved playing by the river. One hot day, he sucked up a trunk full of water and playfully sprayed it into the sky. The water drops sparkled in the sunlight, and to everyone's surprise, they formed a perfect letter E in the air! It looked like a little bridge made of three rainbows. A monkey saw it and shouted, "Wow! An E! For Eddie the Elephant!" Little birds flew over, chirping "E! E!" Eddie was so happy that he flapped his ears and sprayed a small e too. All the animals laughed and cheered. From that day on, everyone in the forest remembered this fun letter. Now you try! Use your finger: draw a straight line down, then a short line across at the top, another short line in the middle, and a longer line at the bottom. See? A lovely E!

knowledge.title: Why does the letter E look like a little shelf?
knowledge.body: The shape of E is like a tiny shelf with two bars, perfect for holding little toys. The earliest E came from an ancient picture of a person raising their hands in joy. That’s why the letter E always reminds us of happiness and energy!
